text.title: Enterprise XR Applications Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the use case fit one of the 5 enterprise XR patterns?

conclusion.verdict: advance to comfort + IT + security + ROI gates
secure procurement plan OR build 2D-fallback hybrid before pilot
2D dashboard or different XR pattern likely better

example.trace: mining training, 72% coverage → coverage gate pass → comfort budget + IT + security + ROI declared

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
